texto: Perhaps as this hostile world oppresses us and tries to lead us away from God’s holy ways, He sends angels on missions of mercy to open our eyes to pathways of holiness. What better way can angels minister to those who are to “inherit salvation” than to facilitate this very thing? (An Angel's View, pp. 69-70).
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Michael O'Neal que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “Perhaps as this hostile world oppresses us and tries to lead us away from God’s holy ways, He sen…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, angels, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e termino.
